items.name: People Skills
items.description: Beer | 5.2% • Our crushable beer is light, refreshing, and gets along with everybody. This smooth, lightly hopped ale offers beautiful mouthfeel and a golden crystal-clear appearance. It's a real crowd pleaser.

items.name: Golden Hour
items.description: Hazy Pale | 5.5% • Golden Hour beer mirrors the hazy golden hue of the sun on the horizon. With each delicious sip you’ll experience a burst of peach, mango, and pineapple, reminiscent of your favorite tropical punch! Make any hour the Golden Hour!

items.name: Departure
items.description: West Coast IPA | 6.7% • Our departure began with a road trip to Yakima, home to the world’s finest hops, sparking a new evolution of our West Coast IPA. With grapefruit, stone fruit, and citrus notes, it’s crisp, aromatic, and breaks away from the ordinary. It’s built for those who carve their own path!

items.name: Late to The Party
items.description: Hazy IPA | 7.2% • A vibrant New England IPA brewed with Citra, El Dorado and Riwaka hops that are bursting with bright citrus notes, pineapple, and pink grapefruit. Smooth and juicy, it's the perfect way to catch up if you're late to the party!

items.name: Prairie Berry Sour
items.description: Sour | 5.9% • We had a lively debate about the greatest berry on earth — and our Prairie-born team quickly agreed: Saskatoon berries win! They bring back memories of purple hands from berry picking and gramma’s famous pie. Proudly grown in the Canadian prairies, these berries inspired a brand new beer.

items.name: Flat Cap
items.description: Stout | 5.2% • Deeply roasty and rich with a surprising presence of hops and a beautiful, smooth, dry finish. If ever a stout were to rock a at cap like Jamie did, this would be that beer!

items.name: Pete's Pils
items.description: Pilsner | 4.5% • This beautifully simple Pilsner is a perfect representation of what life is like in the mountains. It’s easy, flavourful, light, rewarding and it’s even brewed with water originating from Kananaskis | Pick your pour: Hladinka, Šnyt, Mlíko.

items.name: Zero People Skills
items.description: Beer | 0.5% • Barley, Hops, Yeast, and Water. The definition of beer! Still has the same great ingredients. Still the same great People Skills Beer. Still has the same great flavor. But with zero alcohol, I guess we’d have no choice but to call it “Zero People Skills”!

items.name: Zero Red Rage
items.description: Red Ale | 0.5% • This “Zero Version” contains all the same freakish, ginger rage of the original Red Rage, just without the alcohol! items.name: Zero Golden Hour
items.description: Hazy Pale | 0.5% • Zero Golden Hour is all the glow, none of the buzz. Same golden haze, same tropical vibes - peach, mango, pineapple - now at just 0.5%. Whether you're on the clock, on the trails, or just taking it easy, this brew brings the good times without the alcohol. Because Golden Hour isn't about what's in your glass - it's about what's around you.
